title: HasanAbi says he may file a restraining order against Destiny after latest livestream comments
summary_full: In a troubling turn of events, HasanAbi is weighing the option of filing a restraining order against fellow creator Destiny due to what he describes as continuous harassment stemming from Destiny's supporters. He has accused this community of orchestrated harassment and doxxing attempts. HasanAbi insists that this issue is not just about him but is essential for the protection of others.
